headline: Trump 🍊🚨 RED FLAGS Netflix 🥇💥 Warner $72B MONOPOLY ORGY 😩🔒
text:
Trump Daddy 🍊👑 dropping BOMBS 💣📢 at JFK Center 🎭🇺🇸: Netflix 🥇📺 snagging Warner Bros 🧙‍♂️🐉 HBO for THICC $72BN 🤑💰 could be a MASSIVE PROBLEM 😱🚫 cuz Netflix already OWNS the streaming game 🎮📈 with BIG MARKET SHARE 📊🍑 that'd MOON 🚀 even HARDER post-deal! Harry Potter 🧹✨, Game of Thrones 🐉🔥, Looney Tunes 🐰💥, Matrix 💊🕶️, LOTR 🧙‍♂️🍃 all migrating to Netflix's ORGY 🥳💦 of franchises – cementing RED QUEEN 👸 status as WORLD'S BIGGEST STREAMING DADDY 👑📺!

Orange Man 🍊 personally THROWING HANDS ✊ into DOJ approval gauntlet ⚖️🚨, yelling 'VERY BIG SHARE GOING UP A LOT 📈😤!' Shouts out Netflix co-CEO Ted Sarandos 🕶️👨‍💼 who popped into Oval Office 🏛️🍆: 'GREAT PERSON, ONE OF THE BEST JOBS IN MOVIE HISTORY 🎥🏆!' Ted spilling tea ☕: Deal SURPRISED investors 😲 but sets Netflix for DECADES of SLAYING 👑🔥. Warner splitting biz mid-2026 🗓️💥 then BOOM – mega-merger? But WGA writers 😡📝 RAGE-QUITTING: 'BLOCK THIS SHIT 🚫 cuz WORLD'S BIGGEST STREAMER GOBBLING COMPETITOR = JOB KILLS 💀👻, WAGE DROPS 📉😢, PRICES UP 💸😩, CONTENT DIVERSITY DIES 🌈💀!'

Media exec Blair Westlake 💅📺 simping: ONLY HBO stream + Netflix combo MATTERS ⚠️, Warner's studio library 💿🍑 DWARFS Netflix's – deal PASSES with CONCESSIONS 🤑🤝. Ex-FTC boss Bill Kovacic 🤓⚖️: Trump's yapping means WHITE HOUSE 🏛️🍊 running the SHOW 🎪, UNPRECEDENTED PREZ CONTROL 😱👑 over merger drama! Netflix BEAT rivals like Comcast 🏢😭, Paramount Skydance 🚀❌ (David Ellison's crew, son of Trump bro Larry Ellison 🤑🏝️) – Warner said NOPE 🖕 to full buyout, now auctioning itself like eBay thot 🛒😍!

Industry SALTY 🧂😣 over ANTITRUST NIGHTMARE 🕵️‍♂️🚨 but Trump like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔🍊' – will DOJ NUKE it 💥⚖️ or let Netflix-Warner become ULTIMATE MEDIA MONSTER 🧟‍♂️👹? Writers guild CUCKED 😩🔒, Trump WATCHING 👀, Sarandos SIMPING 🤤 – streaming wars about to GO BRRRR 💨📺 or BUST 😤💥‼️
